text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
I thought I heard somebody calling my name,
but...

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
It seems there's nobody here. Was I hearing
things?

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text:
Could it have been... the statue of the Three
Goddesses?
